response.content: {"statements": [{"statement": "BMW's factory long-life coolant is rated for roughly 4-6 years or 100,000-150,000 km.", "reason": "See retrieved context.", "verdict": 1}, {"statement": "After that period, a full flush is recommended to protect the aluminium engine block from corrosion as seals age.", "reason": "See retrieved context.", "verdict": 1}, {"statement": "The full flush also protects plastic coolant system components from corrosion as seals age.", "reason": "See retrieved context.", "verdict": 1}]}
